title: ESIC Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 42 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 42 Senior Resident and Specialist Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS, DNB, Post-graduation, or Diploma can apply for the ESIC Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
